heading: Omitted
label: 500a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized Secretary of the Interior to acquire reindeer and other property, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 250 Stat. 900
